---
title: "Extractive Land Uses and Farm Performance: Evidence of Technology Gaps and Adaptive Efficiency"
author:
  - Francis Tsiboe
  - Mark Appiah-Twumasi
  - Antoinette Tsiboe-Darko
  - Sylvanus Gaku
output:
  word_document:
    reference_docx: reference.docx
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ieee.csl
link-citations: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
if (file.exists("article_objects.json")) {
  objs <- jsonlite::fromJSON("article_objects.json")
}
```

```{r child = "sections/00_abstract.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/01_introduction.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/02_data.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/03_state_of_extraction.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/04_methods.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/05_results.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/06_discussion.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/07_conclusion.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/98_tables_and_figures.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/97_references.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/99_appendix.Rmd"}
```
